name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BakeryMutex ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Process identifiers *)
VARIABLES state, ticket, maxTicket

(* State of each process: 0=idle, 1=trying, 2=critical *)
State == [p \in 1..N |-> 0..2]

(* Ticket assignment: ticket[p] is the ticket number of process p, 0 if not in queue *)
Ticket == [p \in 1..N |-> 0..N]

(* Max ticket seen so far *)
MaxTicket == 0..N

(* Initial state: all idle, no tickets, no max *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ ticket = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ maxTicket = 0

(* Helper: set of processes currently in critical section *)
InCritical == {p \in 1..N : state[p] = 2}

(* Helper: set of processes currently trying to enter *)
Trying == {p \in 1..N : state[p] = 1}

(* Helper: smallest ticket among all processes *)
MinTicket == CHOOSE t \in 1..maxTicket : \A p \in 1..N : ticket[p] = t

(* Helper: process with smallest ticket (unique) *)
MinProcess == CHOOSE p \in 1..N : ticket[p] = MinTicket

(* Transition: a process enters trying state *)
Enter(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = 0
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = 1]
  /\ ticket' = [ticket EXCEPT ![p] = maxTicket + 1]
  /\ maxTicket' = maxTicket + 1

(* Transition: a process enters critical section if it has the smallest ticket *)
EnterCritical(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = 1
  /\ ticket[p] = MinTicket
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = 2]
  /\ ticket' = ticket
  /\ maxTicket' = maxTicket

(* Transition: a process exits critical section *)
Exit(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = 2
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = 0]
  /\ ticket' = [ticket EXCEPT ![p] = 0]
  /\ maxTicket' = maxTicket

(* Next-state relation: any process may perform one of the above actions *)
Next ==
  \E p \in 1..N :
    Enter(p) \/ EnterCritical(p) \/ Exit(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, ticket, maxTicket>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
MutualExclusion == Cardinality(InCritical) <= 1

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N \* Number of participants

VARIABLES state, votes, decision

(* State of each participant: "Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
StateSet == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Possible decisions of the coordinator: "None", "Commit", "Abort" *)
DecisionSet == {"None", "Commit", "Abort"}

(* Initial state: all participants are in Init, no votes, no decision *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"]
        /\ votes = <<>> \* empty sequence of votes
        /\ decision = "None"

(* Participant i sends a Prepare message and moves to Prepared *)
Prepare(i) == /\ state[i] = "Init"
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Prepared"]

(* Participant i votes Yes or No after receiving Prepare *)
VoteYes(i) == /\ state[i] = "Prepared"
              /\ votes' = Append(votes, "Yes")
              /\ UNCHANGED state

VoteNo(i) == /\ state[i] = "Prepared"
             /\ votes' = Append(votes, "No")
             /\ UNCHANGED state

(* Coordinator decides Commit if all votes are Yes, otherwise Abort *)
DecideCommit == /\ decision = "None"
                 /\ \A v \in votes : v = "Yes"
                 /\ decision' = "Commit"
                 /\ UNCHANGED state

DecideAbort == /\ decision = "None"
                /\ \E v \in votes : v = "No"
                /\ decision' = "Abort"
                /\ UNCHANGED state

(* Coordinator sends Commit or Abort to all participants *)
CommitAll == /\ decision = "Commit"
              /\ state' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Committed"]

AbortAll == /\ decision = "Abort"
             /\ state' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Aborted"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: Prepare(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: VoteYes(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: VoteNo(i)
        \/ DecideCommit
        \/ DecideAbort
        \/ CommitAll
        \/ AbortAll

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N


VARIABLES state, left, right

(* State space: each philosopher can be in one of three states *)
States == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking and no forks are held *)
Init == 
  /\ state \in [1..N -> States]
  /\ left \in [1..N -> 0..1]
  /\ right \in [1..N -> 0..1]
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: left[i] = 0
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: right[i] = 0

(* Helper predicates for fork ownership *)
LeftForkHeld(i) == left[i] = 1
RightForkHeld(i) == right[i] = 1

(* Transition: philosopher i picks up both forks if hungry and both forks are free *)
PickUp(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ ~LeftForkHeld(i)
  /\ ~RightForkHeld(i)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  /\ left' = [left EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
  /\ right' = [right EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, left, right>>

(* Transition: philosopher i puts down both forks after eating *)
PutDown(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
  /\ left' = [left EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ right' = [right EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, left, right>>

(* Transition: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Think(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, left, right>>

(* STRING philosopher can transition *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N:
    PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i) \/ Think(i)

(* Invariant: no two adjacent philosophers eat simultaneously *)
NoDeadlock == \A i \in 1..N: ~(state[i] = "eating" /\ state[%(i, N) + 1] = "eating")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, left, right>>

(* Type correctness *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ state \in [1..N -> States]
  /\ left \in [1..N -> 0..1]
  /\ right \in [1..N -> 0..1]
====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
  LET maxNum == IF \E j \in 1..N : num[j] > 0 THEN Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N}) ELSE 0
  IN \E step \in {"choose", "enter", "leave"} :

      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
      /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]

      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

      /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
      /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices modulo K, size is the number of elements *)

Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer ==
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1) (* placeholder for produced value *)
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<head>>

Consumer ==
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<tail>>

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* number of servers, N, NULL
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* State values *)
Leader == "Leader"
Follower == "Follower"
Candidate == "Candidate"

(* Helper: majority threshold *)
Majority == (N \div 2) + 1

Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> Follower]

(* RequestVote RPC: candidate i requests vote from j *)
RequestVote(i, j) ==
    /\ state[j] = Follower
    /\ currentTerm[j] <= currentTerm[i]
    /\ votedFor[j] = NULL \/ votedFor[j] = i
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Vote granted by j to i *)
VoteGranted(i, j) ==
    /\ state[j] = Follower
    /\ currentTerm[j] <= currentTerm[i]
    /\ votedFor[j] = NULL
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

(* Candidate i becomes leader if majority votes *)
BecomeLeader(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = Candidate
    /\ \E votes \in SUBSET 1..N : \card(votes) >= Majority
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Leader]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* State transitions for a single server i *)
Next_i(i) ==
    \/ \* Follower stays follower
       state[i] = Follower /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
    \/ \* Candidate requests votes
       state[i] = Candidate
       /\ \E j \in 1..N : RequestVote(i, j)
       /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
    \/ \* Leader stays leader
       state[i] = Leader
       /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N : Next_i(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Invariants *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ currentTerm \in Nat
    /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> {NULL} \cup 1..N]
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {Follower, Candidate, Leader}]

NoTwoLeaders == \A i, j \in 1..N : (state[i] = Leader /\ state[j] = Leader) => i = j

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* Number of readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* readers is a set of reader IDs currently holding the read lock *)
(* writer_active is a boolean indicating whether a writer holds the lock *)

Init == /\ readers = {}
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

(* Reader i attempts to acquire the read lock *)
AcquireRead(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ writer_active = FALSE
    /\ readers' = readers \cup {i}
    /\ writer_active' = writer_active

(* Reader i releases the read lock *)
ReleaseRead(i) == 
    /\ i \in readers
    /\ readers' = readers \setminus {i}
    /\ writer_active' = writer_active

(* Writer attempts to acquire the write lock *)
AcquireWrite == 
    /\ readers = {}
    /\ writer_active = FALSE
    /\ writer_active' = TRUE

(* Writer releases the write lock *)
ReleaseWrite == 
    /\ writer_active = TRUE
    /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: AcquireRead(i)
        \/ \E i \in readers: ReleaseRead(i)
        \/ AcquireWrite
        \/ ReleaseWrite

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan
(* Proc is the set of processes, Chan is the set of directed channels (p,q) *)

VARIABLES state, channel, recvd

(* state[p] is the local state of process p
   channel[(p,q)] is the sequence of messages in transit on channel p->q
   recvd[p] is the set of processes from which p has received a marker *)

Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ recvd = [p \in Proc |-> {}]

Send(p, q, m) == 
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], m)
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd>>

Recv(p, q) ==
  LET msg == Head(channel[(q, p)]) IN
  /\ channel'[(q, p)] = Tail(channel[(q, p)])
  /\ state'[p] = state[p] + msg
  /\ UNCHANGED <<recvd, channel>>

RecordState(p) ==
  /\ state'[p] = state[p] + 1
  /\ recvd'[p] = recvd[p] \cup {p}
  /\ UNCHANGED channel

SendMarker(p, q) ==
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], "marker")
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd>>

ReceiveMarker(p, q) ==
  LET msg == Head(channel[(q, p)]) IN
  /\ channel'[(q, p)] = Tail(channel[(q, p)])
  /\ recvd'[p] = recvd[p] \cup {q}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel>>

Next ==
  \E p, q \in Proc :
    \E m \in Nat :
      (Send(p, q, m) \/ Recv(p, q) \/ RecordState(p) \/ 
       (state[p] = 1 /\ SendMarker(p, q)) \/ 
       (state[p] = 2 /\ ReceiveMarker(p, q)))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, recvd>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [Proc -> Nat]
          /\ channel \in [Chan -> Seq(Nat \cup {"marker"})]
          /\ recvd \in [Proc -> SUBSET Proc]

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* State variable: the node that currently holds the token *)
VARIABLE token

(* Initial condition: node 1 starts with the token *)
Init == token = 1

(* Next-state relation: the token moves to the next node in the ring *)
Next == token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

(* The full specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

(* Invariant: the token always belongs to a valid node *)
TypeOK == token \in 1..N
====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

(* State: a partial function from Keys to Values *)
VARIABLES store

(* Initial state: empty store *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Helper to update store with a new key-value pair *)
Update(k, v) == store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get operation *)
Next ==
    \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
        (Update(k, v))

(* Spec *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

(* Invariant: store maps keys to values or NULL *)
TypeOK == \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values \/ store[k] = NULL

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, NULL

VARIABLES ballots, promises, accepts, chosen, v

(* ballots: [1..M -> Nat]  -- current ballot number for each proposer
   promises: [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]  -- highest promised ballot and value seen by each acceptor
   accepts: [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]  -- highest accepted ballot and value by each acceptor
   chosen: [V -> BOOLEAN]  -- whether a value has been chosen *)

vars == <<ballots, promises, accepts, chosen>>

Init ==
    /\ ballots = [i \in 1..M |-> 0]
    /\ promises = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ accepts = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ chosen = [v \in V |-> FALSE]

(* Proposer i starts a new proposal with value v *)
Propose(i, v) ==
    /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<promises, accepts, chosen>>

(* Acceptor j responds to a prepare request from proposer i with ballot b *)
Prepare(j, i, b) ==
    /\ promises[j].ballot <= b
    /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![j] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> promises[j].value]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, accepts, chosen>>

(* Acceptor j accepts a proposal from proposer i with ballot b and value v *)
Accept(j, i, b, v) ==
    /\ promises[j].ballot = b
    /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![j] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, chosen>>

(* If a value v is chosen, it remains chosen forever *)
Choose(v) ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v' \in V :
           accepts[i].ballot = b /\ accepts[i].value = v'
    /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![v] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, accepts>>

Next ==
    \E i \in 1..M : \E v \in V :
        Propose(i, v)
    \/ \E j \in 1..N : \E i \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N :
        Prepare(j, i, b)
    \/ \E j \in 1..N : \E i \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
        Accept(j, i, b, v)
    \/ \E v \in V : Choose(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

(* Invariant: once a value is chosen, it is never changed *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ ballots \in [1..M -> Nat]
    /\ promises \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]
    /\ accepts \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]
    /\ chosen \in [V -> BOOLEAN]

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
\* Import the TLC and TLA+ standard library
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* CONSTANTS
\*   FILE_SIZE   -- total number of chunks in the file
\*   MAX_RETRIES -- maximum number of retransmissions per chunk
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS FILE_SIZE, MAX_RETRIES

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VARIABLES
\*   sent      -- set of chunks that have been successfully received
\*   pending   -- set of chunks that are currently in flight (sent but not yet acknowledged)
\*   retries   -- mapping from chunk number to number of retransmission attempts
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES sent, pending, retries

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper definitions
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* All chunk indices
Chunks == 1 .. FILE_SIZE

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Initial state: nothing sent yet, no pending chunks, zero retries
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ sent = {}
    /\ pending = {}
    /\ retries = [c \in Chunks |-> 0]

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Sending a new chunk: pick an unsent chunk, send it (add to pending)
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Send ==
    \E c \in Chunks \setminus (sent \cup pending) :
        /\ pending' = pending \cup {c}
        /\ retries' = [retries EXCEPT ![c] = retries[c] + 1]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retries>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Acknowledgment: a pending chunk is received successfully
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Ack ==
    \E c \in pending :
        /\ sent' = sent \cup {c}
        /\ pending' = pending \ {c}
        /\ UNCHANGED retries

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Loss: a pending chunk is lost (no state change except that it remains pending)
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Loss ==
    \E c \in pending :
        /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, pending, retries>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Retransmission: if a chunk has been sent but not yet acknowledged,
\*                 and the number of attempts is below MAX_RETRIES,
\*                 we may retransmit it (no state change except incrementing
\*                 the retry counter)
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Retransmit ==
    \E c \in pending :
        /\ retries[c] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ retries' = [retries EXCEPT ![c] = retries[c] + 1]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, pending>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The next-state relation: one of the actions may occur
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \/ Send
    \/ Ack
    \/ Loss
    \/ Retransmit

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The full specification: initial state and next-state relation
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, pending, retries>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Invariant: the set of sent chunks is always a subset of all chunks
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
TypeOK == sent \subseteq Chunks

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Liveness property: eventually all chunks are sent
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
SpecComplete == Spec /\ <> (sent = Chunks)

====
